Package neqsim.process.automation

Class TransactionalBatchResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.automation.TransactionalBatchResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class TransactionalBatchResult extends Object implements Serializable
Outcome of a call to ProcessAutomation.setValuesTransactional(java.util.Map, String). Carries per-write validation results, a global commit/rollback flag, the rollback reason when applicable, and the JSON schema version.

A transactional batch follows three phases:

  1. Validate — every requested write is sent through the WriteValidatorRegistry. If any validator returns an ERROR result, the batch is rejected without touching the simulation.
  2. Apply — every write is applied via ProcessAutomation.setVariableValue(String, double, String).
  3. Run and verify — the underlying ProcessSystem or ProcessModel is run. If run() throws, the previous values (snapshotted in phase 0) are restored and a final run() is attempted to leave the simulation in a coherent state.

The toJson() method renders this result with stable field names (schemaVersion, committed, rolledBack, rollbackReason, rollbackCategory, writes) so agents and MCP clients can branch on the outcome without parsing free text.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa
See Also:

    TransactionalBatchResult.RollbackCategory
    Classifies why a batch was rolled back (or null when committed).

    Per-write outcome inside a transactional batch.

    committed(List<TransactionalBatchResult.WriteOutcome> writes)

    Returns the rollback category when the batch was rolled back, otherwise null.

    Returns the rollback reason when the batch was rolled back, otherwise null.

    Returns the per-write outcomes in the order they were requested.

    Returns whether the batch was committed (true) or rolled back (false).
    boolean

    Convenience inverse of isCommitted().
    static Map<String,Double>
    newRequestMap()
    Returns an empty mutable map intended for callers that want to build their own outcome list without depending on internal LinkedHashMap usage.

  • Constructor Details

    • TransactionalBatchResult

      public TransactionalBatchResult(boolean committed, TransactionalBatchResult.RollbackCategory rollbackCategory, String rollbackReason, List<TransactionalBatchResult.WriteOutcome> writes)
      Creates a transactional batch result.
      Parameters:
      committed - true when all phases succeeded and the writes are persisted
      rollbackCategory - the rollback category when committed is false, otherwise null
      rollbackReason - a human-readable explanation when committed is false, otherwise null
      writes - the per-write outcomes in the order they were requested; never null

  • Method Details

    • isCommitted

      public boolean isCommitted()
      Returns whether the batch was committed (true) or rolled back (false).
      Returns:
      true when the writes are persisted

    • isRolledBack

      public boolean isRolledBack()
      Convenience inverse of isCommitted().
      Returns:
      true when the batch was rolled back

    • getRollbackCategory

      public TransactionalBatchResult.RollbackCategory getRollbackCategory()
      Returns the rollback category when the batch was rolled back, otherwise null.
      Returns:
      the rollback category or null

    • getRollbackReason

      public String getRollbackReason()
      Returns the rollback reason when the batch was rolled back, otherwise null.
      Returns:
      the rollback reason or null

    • getWrites

      public List<TransactionalBatchResult.WriteOutcome> getWrites()
      Returns the per-write outcomes in the order they were requested.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of write outcomes

    • toJson

      public com.google.gson.JsonObject toJson()
      Renders this batch result as a JSON object.
      Returns:
      a JSON object with stable field names

    • committed

      public static TransactionalBatchResult committed(List<TransactionalBatchResult.WriteOutcome> writes)
      Convenience constructor for a successful commit.
      Parameters:
      writes - per-write outcomes
      Returns:
      a committed batch result

    • rolledBack

      public static TransactionalBatchResult rolledBack(TransactionalBatchResult.RollbackCategory category, String reason, List<TransactionalBatchResult.WriteOutcome> writes)
      Convenience constructor for a rollback.
      Parameters:
      category - the rollback category; never null
      reason - the rollback reason; never null
      writes - per-write outcomes
      Returns:
      a rolled-back batch result

    • newRequestMap

      public static Map<String,Double> newRequestMap()
      Returns an empty mutable map intended for callers that want to build their own outcome list without depending on internal LinkedHashMap usage.
      Returns:
      a new empty map
